/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/X: APPEARING FOR THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY IS CERTIFIED LAW CLERK ALEX HASTINGS, SUPERVISED BY ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY JONATHAN YANG,/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER RICHARD NATHIESEN/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 1- CERTIFIED COPY OF CLETS RAP SHEET/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2- CERTIFIED COPY OF SFPD BOOKING PHOTO/EXHM: PEOPLE'S 3- CERTIFIED COPY OF CAD RECORD/EXHMA: PEOPLE' 4- CERTIFIED COPY OF RECORD FROM CA DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE BUREAU OF FIREARMS/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 5- PHOTO OF TRASH PILE/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 6- ZOOMED IN PHOTO OF EXHIBIT 5/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 7- PHOTO OF FIREARM/X: PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS:/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/  /HTA1:1, 2 AND 3/871D:4/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION IN DEPT 22 ON 05-24-22/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHERORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL: ADDED TO CALENDAR PER DEFENSE REQUEST TO ADDRESS RELEASE CONDITIONS//ACM/CTORD: PARTICIPATE IN COUNSELING-THERAPY AND M3 SUPPORT GROUP THROUGHCASC AND PROVIDE PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT, REPORT TO SFPDP 5X PER WEEK FOR SUPERVISION/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES:WORK, THERAPY, CASC PROGRAMS/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD: HEARING DATE OF 05-06-22/X: THE HEARING DATE OF 05-10-22 IS CONFIRMED,/
